description: Export a SIRIUS .ms file (and a compound-info TSV) from mzML + optional featureXML using SiriusExportAlgorithm, for downstream formula/structure elucidation in SIRIUS.
rules: INPUT is an mzML (with MS2); FEATUREXML optionally groups spectra
writes export.ms and export_compounds.tsv under record_store
the mzML must carry SourceFile metadata; synthetic/hand-built mzML may fail this (re-export through OpenMS FileConverter)
usage: Set INPUT (mzML). Optional FEATUREXML. Output: export.ms (+ export_compounds.tsv).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) AND a SourceFile-annotated mzML; if absent or unannotated the core exits early and the porter records the reason while still creating export.ms.
